patterns.pattern: ^(\w+) becomes wreathed in magma, charging at (.+) and smashing straight through the magical shield that surrounds \w+\.$
^Wreathing (you)rself in magma, you charge into (.+), smashing through the magical shield that surrounds \w+ with the might of your stone\-forged form\.$
^Imbuing your form with the might of earth, (you) launch a terrible assault upon (.+), raining blow after blow down upon \w+ with your empowered fists\.$
^(\w+) glows an ominous red as \w+ rains blow after blow down upon (.+) in a devastating flurry of attacks\.$
^(You) call up a column of magma to strike down (.+), but \w+ steps back away from the danger\.$
^(\w+) calls up a colunn of magma to strike down (.+), but \w+ quickly steps back out of danger\.$
^(\w+) calls up a column of magma to strike down (.+), but \w+ quickly steps back out of danger\.$
^(\w+) calls up a column of magma, sending it crashing down upon the helpless form of (.+)\.$
^(You) call up a column of magma, sending it crashing over the helpless form of (.+)\.$
^(\w+) summons up a column of magma, sending it crashing down upon the over confident form of (.+)\.$
^(You) call up a column of magma, sending it crashing down upon the over confident form of (.+)\.$
^The stone-forged form of (\w+) steps before \w+, protecting \w+ from those that would strike out against \w+ charge\.$
^(You) move to stand before \w+ ready to protect \w+ from harm\.$
^(You) manifest rocks directly above \w+, burying \w+ under a cascading hammer of stone\.$
^(\w+) points at (.+), who is suddenly buried under a cascading downpour of stone\.$
^(\w+) brings? one of \w+ stone fists down upon (.+) in a smashing blow\.$
^(You) launch a magma\-wreathed fist at (.+), but \w+ ducks aside at the last moment\.$
^(\w+) swings a magma\-wreathed punch at (.+), but \w+ ducks aside at the last possible moment\.$
^Impossibly fast, (\w+) brings a magma\-wreathed fist around, driving it straight through the magical shield surrounding (.+) without visible effort\.$
^(You) bring a magma\-wreathed fist around, pulverising the magical shield surrounding (.+) with a single blow\.$
^(\w+) rains? a flurry of blows down upon (.+) with \w+ stone fists\.$
